cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the problem is about Jane's birthday and finding a date 10 days before that. Let me start by breaking down the information given. Now, today is her 16-year-old birthday. That means today's date is her 16th birthday. So if she was born in 2001, adding 16 years would make today's date 2017. Specifically, her birthday in 2017 would be February 28, 2017. But wait, is 2017 a leap year? Let's check. 2016 was a leap year, then the next one is 2020. So 2017 isn't a leap year. Wait, that would be February 18, 2017. But looking at the options, (B) is 02/18/2017. But let me double-check my math because sometimes months can be tricky. Wait, February has 28 days in 2017.
